infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VoxLink needs camera access for video calls so the other person can see you.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VoxLink needs microphone access for audio and video calls.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: VoxLink needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures and KYC documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: VoxLink needs permission to save photos to your library.
